case_title: TOTEDA, STEVEN D VS BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO FRANZ J. BOSSHARD, AGENT FOR THERMADOR APPLIANCE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOTEDA, STEVEN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION $5,532.42 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,564.42, THE COURT ORDERS RECESSION OF THE PURCHASE OF THE THERMADOR RANGE. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE SUBJECT MONEY JUDGMENT, AND PLAINTIFF SHALL COOPERATE WITH DEFENDANT IN EFFECTING THE RETURN OF THE RANGE AT AN AGREED UPON DATE AND TIME WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE MAILING OF THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION
DOCKET AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED TO APPEAL COURT.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28103, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOTEDA, STEVEN D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BSH HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION $5,532.42 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,564.42, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 28103 ON 05/22/06. NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF AND DEFT. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION W/FILE FOLDER BY APPEAL DIVISION.
